channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried officially asks Trump for a presidential pardon
item.description: The fallen crypto mogul serving a 25-year sentence filed a clemency petition, betting on Donald Trump's history of crypto pardons even though the president had told him not to count on one.

item.title: The startup killer: Ledger CTO says the EU's crushing compliance costs are choking Web3 innovation
item.description: Industry insiders warn that MiCA's steep financial barriers are choking early-stage innovation.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Buys the Dip Amid 'Superficial' Crypto Selloff, Adding $214M in Ethereum
item.description: Leading Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies bought the dip, making its largest weekly ETH purchase so far this year.

item.title: Aave chief defends protocol's 'resilience' after $8.45 billion bank run
item.description: The founder of the largest DeFi platform blamed "third-party” entities for decentralized finance’s vulnerabilities, while independent data highlights severe gaps in Aave’s own risk architecture.

item.title: Bitcoin price $60K support not yet safe as more macro headwinds stack up
item.description: Bitcoin analysis warned that $60,000 may not hold next, as bear-market moves continued and macro hurdles multiplied.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1.7B as outflow streak hits four weeks
item.description: BlackRock’s IBIT accounted for most of the weekly Bitcoin ETF redemptions, while Fidelity and Grayscale funds also saw outflows.

item.title: Blame bitcoin's tumble on rising inflation, not Strategy, 10xResearch argues
item.description: The main driver behind bitcoin's weakness was ETF selling after red-hot April U.S. inflation data, 10x's Markus Thielen argued. The bounce may hinge on Wednesday's CPI data, he said.

item.title: Bitcoin price eyes $90K as FTX-era BTC bullish divergence flashes again
item.description: Bitcoin flashes only its second weekly bullish divergence on record, a signal that previously preceded a 755% BTC price rally.

item.title: South Korea police raid Bithumb over lawmaker hiring favoritism probe: report
item.description: South Korean lawmaker Kim Byung-gi faces probe over alleged nepotism tied to his son’s crypto jobs as police raid Bithumb's offices.

item.title: Congress to Discuss Crypto Tax Rules: What to Watch
item.description: The House Ways and Means committee will review draft crypto tax bills covering staking, mining, network fees, and reporting.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Strategy Buys Bitcoin, Pads Cash Reserves Following Biggest Weekly Stock Drop Since 2022
item.description: Strategy’s stockpile was $10.7 billion underwater as of Monday morning after Bitcoin hit its lowest price since October 2024.s

item.title: Strategy buys 1,550 Bitcoin after controversial 32 BTC sale
item.description: Strategy resumed Bitcoin buying by purchasing 1,550 BTC for $101.3 million, bringing its total holdings to 845,256 BTC after last week’s controversial sale.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR gains 12.3% as almost all assets trade higher
item.description: Bittensor (TAO), up 12% from Friday, joined NEAR Protocol (NEAR) as a top performer.

item.title: 🇺🇸 LATEST: Stand With Crypto and more than 200 companies and organizations have signed a letter urging Senate leaders to bring the Clarity Act to the Senate floor. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBObWNZcWpMaHhNNmtONjNSdktZbjR1MmdIdnRacUh5cTBjdnRicW5Eb1E2Zl9RUWJ6YXVETHlDMVctdXZveVVMMnZrT2JsVlY2d2p4dzFid3ZWYm9CclNlVEtTYlo?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 LATEST: Stand With Crypto …

item.title: MetaMask Launches AI Agent Wallet With Built-In Security Controls
item.description: MetaMask's new self-custodial wallet is designed to let AI agents trade across DeFi while keeping users in control of funds and approvals.

item.title: MetaMask launches AI agent wallet with built-in security for crypto trades
item.description: The launch comes as AI agents increasingly emerge as participants in crypto markets, executing trades and managing capital on behalf of users.

item.title: Bitmine bought the dip, making its biggest ether purchase in 2026 as prices tanked
item.description: The company bought 126,971 ETH last week, worth roughly $214 million at current prices, despite chairman Tom Lee's earlier calls to slow purchases.

item.title: Bitcoin's $63K Reclaim Liquidates $540M in Crypto Shorts, a 7-Week High
item.description: Experts remain cautious of Bitcoin’s weekend rebound to $63,000, pointing to ETF outflows and CME BTC volatility.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Recovers After Fall Below $60k
item.description: Crypto rebounded Monday after Friday's selloff, driven by strong jobs data, AI IPO liquidity drain and Saylor worries.

item.title: Strategy buys 1,550 bitcoin one week after selling $2.5 million of coins
item.description: Strategy adds bitcoin and cash after raising $181 million through stock sales.

item.title: White hats rescue $500K in NFTs after Flooring exploit
item.description: CoinGecko and NFT Price Floor data show NFT market cap has cooled since April, while CryptoPunks and BAYC remain top collections by value.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin tops $63,000 as Strategy adds $100 million BTC in latest purchase
item.description: Meanwhile, Strive bought 32 bitcoin, the same number Strategy dumped last week.

item.title: A crucial bitcoin market indicator is signaling that the worst of the crypto crash might be over
item.description: The metric shows bitcoin's market price is getting close to its realized fair value after the recent sell-off.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vivek Ramaswamy's 'Strive' buys 32 Bitcoin worth $2 million. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9RYlptajdzV1I0VkNUNDZYM0k3X2Yxc3ZpV2RqMThGN3FYaXJJSC10c3o0ZF9PZ0Nfc3JMcHBhaUQ0VmZ3WEpBYXlod1FHWFVIRTNicERTcDNHNGZ5ZEhWZVN3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vivek Ramaswamy's 'S…

item.title: BTC price bottom not due until Q4? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin traders warned that it should be Q3 at least before the real BTC price bear market bottom entered.

item.title: Reform UK's Farage 'Evading' Scrutiny Over Tether Billionaire's $6.7M Gift: Labour
item.description: Labour Party Chair Anna Turley wrote to Nigel Farage accusing him of “evading reasonable scrutiny” over Christopher Harborne’s gift.

item.title: Bybit challenges Wall Street with a massive push into tokenized U.S. stock IPOs
item.description: Retail investors can now buy shares at official underwritten prices through the crypto exchange, bypassing Wall Street’s exclusive pre-IPO clubs.

item.title: Crypto's recovery remains elusive as SpaceX, Anthropic IPOs loom
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 8, 2026

item.title: Chinese court treats Bitcoin as property in 107 BTC memory theft case
item.description: Man in eastern China who stole 107 Bitcoin using a memorized seed phrase gets 10 years and nine months behind bars.

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady after Sunday's rally, though full-fledged reversal may take longer
item.description: Bitcoin is holding above $63,000 after rallying on Sunday. The price is now hovering near a key 200-week moving average that often marks major cycle turning points.

item.title: Recent UK crypto sanctions seem to be a bit of an overreach. Wonder if it will ever get to the point where it’s ignored because HTX address tainting onchain has been catastrophic. In the past sanctions were done and those crypto businesses typically had a hig - x.com

item.title: Zcash teams propose Ironwood pool to restore supply verification after Orchard flaw
item.description: Ironwood would close the old Orchard pool to new activity and route funds through a turnstile before they enter a new shielded pool.

item.title: Gold slips below 200-day moving average offering glimmer of hope for bitcoin bulls
item.description: Gold falls into bear market territory, while a stronger U.S. dollar and rising rate expectations pressure risk assets.

item.title: #Bitcoin acting at a higher timeframe support and it bounced upwards from the 200-Week MA. Very likely that price doesn't cascade down today if indices are turning green, yields fall and $STRC doesn't continue to depeg. Even better: If Michael Saylor has be - x.com

item.title: U.S. inflation, European Central Bank rate decision: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 8.

item.title: CME is letting traders bet on bitcoin volatility, not price, and two firms have already placed bets
item.description: Monarq and DV Chain kick off trading in CME's bitcoin volatility index futures.

item.title: LATEST: 🏦 JPMorgan is turning cautious on crypto, warning Strategy’s cash reserves cover just 6.3 months of dividends and giving the CLARITY Act less than 50% odds of passing. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5WakdQazA4SmgxYWFQVlU1MmJsSXE2Xzh2S0lSZHBrZllLalg5b3R4aVQxVnVrNW5ZYVA5TUhYSWs2NGpZc1JhRURubzFHcE1ockh5VElTS3lzXy1mX3dFNGtfYlg?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: 🏦 JPMorgan is turning …

item.title: Zcash bounces 45% as developers propose new 'Ironwood' upgrade
item.description: The plan would let anyone verify that no counterfeit coins are circulating, addressing the patched bug that triggered last week's crash. ZEC is still down about 22% on the week.

item.title: Bitcoin crashed. Bitcoin crashes are a recurring feature of crypto markets. Liquidation cascades, macro shocks, and excessive leverage can all trigger sharp drawdowns across the entire ecosystem. Our research team breaks down why Bitcoin crashes happen, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBfZGQzN0VDQnNOQnZ3blJFdzlJNmlQVHRwSGl1T1EtYXBqeTRCQWdSeDAxeTl3anNMOUxZeWQ2TjBxUTNQN1ZwcHpzY3hYcG9wZlJ1MjZkdS1POG8?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin crashed. Bitcoin crashes are a recu…

item.title: Arthur Hayes dumps WLD days after Maelstrom’s AI IPO pitch
item.description: Maelstrom’s Arthur Hayes has been on a selling spree recently, offloading positions in HYPE, ZEC, NEAR and now WLD.

item.title: Galaxy drops CLARITY Act odds to 60% as time is running out
item.description: Galaxy Digital says the Senate has a tight calendar ahead of the November elections, and the time needed to fix up and pass a key crypto bill is quickly fading.

item.title: XRP steadies above $1.10 to bounce from four-month lows
item.description: XRP recovered from four-month lows on elevated volume, but the token remains trapped below key resistance levels even as ETF inflows and exchange outflows continue to build.

item.title: Bitcoin's rally to $63,700 triggers $504 million losses for short sellers, most since late April
item.description: Traders betting against bitcoin lost $504 million over 24 hours as it bounced from below $60,000, though a fresh Iran-Israel flare-up pulled prices back on Monday.

item.title: Bitcoin spikes, then dumps, from $63,700 as analysts assess Strategy's next BTC moves
item.description: BTC, ETH, XRP and others pulled back from their overnight highs as Iran-Israel tensions and oil rally triggered risk aversion in Asian stocks.

item.title: 🚨 ASIAN MARKETS ARE BLEEDING. Around $1.5 TRILLION was wiped out from Asian stocks today. 🇯🇵 Japan: ¥61.6T erased 🇰🇷 South Korea: ₩556T wiped out 🇹🇼 Taiwan: NT$7.4T gone 🇨🇳 China: ¥2.1T+ erased 🇭🇰 Hong Kong: HK$848B wiped out 🇮🇳 I - x.com

item.title: I'll be the first to turn bullish on Bitcoin when the long-term technicals hit exhaustion and the trend turns. I've argued Q2/Q3 would mark the bottom based on historical bear-market structures. Its playing out that way. The relative setup is approaching very attracti - x.com

item.title: Tokenization firm Securitize clears key SEC hurdle for NYSE listing
item.description: The firm announced that the US securities regulator has declared its S-4 registration statement effective, bringing it closer to a SPAC merger with Cantor Equity Partners II.

item.title: Justin Sun’s HTX delists Trump family’s USD1 amid freeze fight
item.description: HTX said World Liberty froze its addresses and has responded by delisting and suspending the platform’s token.

item.title: Bitcoin closed the week above the 200W SMA after sweeping the low from February - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE51ckRKUWlQaUQ5RFVReWFXb2l0UmVoMzZEWWotUzRLT0dZUDFMbVVvbEVMcFNYOFNJZWtmVVF6LTYtWlowQkdDelZhUWJ6VFQxN2lrYXBYWWwxQUxnY21ZMEdhM1U?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin closed the week above t…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin surges 5% to $64,000 after President Trump says Israeli PM Netanyahu has "no choice" but to accept an Iran deal. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5nT3ZCdDVUZExIU1Z2X0FYT3dtMEhJM2p3RzJPaERHWkYtYjdqRTBIN1lQR0VQcENjU1ZSVUpDUzJfdTVPOFg1d19uM1YzOWlhNVlNM2JDOFczT3E4aW5BY09R?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin surges 5% to $64,…

item.title: What happens to Bitcoin if Nasdaq falls further?
item.description: Bitcoin eyes a rally toward $92,630 as BTC defends key long-term support while the Nasdaq flashes deeper correction risks.

item.title: Strategy’s Saylor signals BTC buy as preferred dividend pay date vote looms
item.description: Strategy’s top execs took to social media on Sunday to tout its Bitcoin strategy while shareholders cast final votes on a proposal for twice-monthly preferred stock dividend payments.

item.title: It’s sad that all the rich people left crypto and it’s now the entire industry is just teenagers in America forcing poor people to do shameful things. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5YbzA3Q3lQZTdwMFVaTnNwenJ4T3BlTTFzVVp5cGxROVduNWMxOUNMZTNzdG1qN1NocXVZWnVEek1KU3M3bmlCaG51MjAzdHhlb2RTYVE4VklKRFFzMTRERQ?oc=5" target="_blank">It’s sad that all the rich people le…

item.title: Frontier AI Models Can Find Crypto's Biggest Bugs. Experts Warn the Industry Isn't Ready
item.description: The Zcash vulnerability uncovered with help from Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 signals a shift in who may discover critical flaws first.

item.title: 🚨 JAPAN MAY BE ABOUT TO TRIGGER ANOTHER CRYPTO CRASH. USD/JPY is back above 160 again. This is the same danger zone where Japan usually starts getting serious about defending the yen. And when Japan intervenes, the chain reaction is sim - x.com

item.title: Wall Street Is Coming for Hyperliquid's Perps Crown, Arthur Hayes Says
item.description: Arthur Hayes warned that Hyperliquid's core value driver—using trading fees to burn tokens—exposes the protocol to market share losses.

item.title: Bitcoin risks new purge with bear-market losses still $35B below 2022 total
item.description: Bitcoin realized losses remained below the $211 billion tally from 2022, leading to a prediction that the next bear-market bottom was not yet in.

item.title: Our corporate @Strategy is to increase net Bitcoin and Bitcoin per share over time. Rumors otherwise are just rumors. - x.com
